subcodes.first_line: O thou yearning flame, thou who art afire with the love of God! I have read thy letter, and its contents
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الشعله الحبیه الملتهبه بنار محبه الله انی قرئت کتابک الوارد من عندک و
subcodes.subjects: @Judas, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @predictions and prophecies, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
